title: add comment to #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] on handle_state_change
description: client_task.rs line 543: the allow attribute has no explanation. A contributor seeing a suppressed lint without a rationale cannot tell whether it was a lazy shortcut or an intentional design decision. The arguments are all required async context that cannot be bundled into a self receiver (handle_state_change is a free async fn, not a method), and factoring them into a struct would add indirection without clarity. A one-line comment stating this would make the allow self-documenting rather than a silent suppression.
